pr.title: grdisplay cleanup and near match of grDisplay_801C5DB0
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2259 cleaned up grdisplay code and introduced a near match for grDisplay_801C5DB0. The main diff reworked grDisplay_801C5B90 with typed matrix, flag, shadow, and JObj traversal logic, added grDisplay_801C5DB0 control flow for ground display/camera/fog handling, tightened Ground_801C1E84 from void* to HSD_GObj*, and replaced a local HSD_CObjGetViewMtx inline in jobj.c with HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect. The automated report says grDisplay_801C5DB0 improved from 0.00% to 99.58% and grDisplay_801C5B90 from 99.08% to 99.85%.

key_files.role: Primary decomp cleanup and near-match work for grDisplay_801C5B90 and grDisplay_801C5DB0.
Implementation return type for Ground_801C1E84 changed from void* to HSD_GObj*.
Header prototype for Ground_801C1E84 updated to HSD_GObj*.
Removed local HSD_CObjGetViewMtx inline and used HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect in HSD_JObjDispAll.

what_changed: Added grdisplay.h, inlines.h, lb/forward.h, baselib/fog.h, and baselib/state.h includes to grdisplay.c to support typed macros and display/fog/state calls.
Changed grDisplay_801C5B90 signature from generic void*/arg names to HSD_JObj*, Mtx vmtx, u32 flags, and u32 rendermode, and replaced raw flag constants with JOBJ_INSTANCE and JOBJ_HIDDEN.
Reworked grDisplay_801C5B90 into explicit JObj instance handling, matrix setup, recursive child display traversal, fighter shadow updates, lbShadow_8000EFEC, and HSD_JObjDisp calls.
Added grDisplay_801C5DB0 as a near match with Ground, camera, fog, shadow, HSD_StateInvalidate, HSD_GObj_JObjCallback, and grDisplay_801C5B90 paths.
Changed Ground_801C1E84 return type in both ground.c and ground.h from void* to HSD_GObj* so callers can use gobj fields directly.
Removed a source-local inline HSD_CObjGetViewMtx from jobj.c and replaced its use with HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect(cobj).

smart_moves.text: Updated both the function definition and header prototype for Ground_801C1E84 when the grdisplay caller treated the return value as an HSD_GObj.
Replaced raw JObj flag constants in grDisplay_801C5B90 with named JOBJ_INSTANCE and JOBJ_HIDDEN flags, improving reviewability without changing the address-style function name.
Used existing accessor/helper forms such as GET_GROUND, GET_COBJ, GET_JOBJ, GET_FOG, HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect, and HSD_ASSERT instead of leaving raw pointer or assert shapes in the shown code.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered caller proves a more specific return type, update the owning header and implementation together rather than casting at the call site.
evidence_refs: diff:Ground_801C1E84 void* to HSD_GObj* in ground.c and ground.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: For display/JObj matching, prefer existing matrix and object helpers over local one-off inlines when an established helper expresses the operation.

Cleanup of a near match can include replacing decompiler-style temps and raw args with local role names like gp, camgobj, foggobj, fighter, shadow, vec, flags, and rendermode when the roles are directly visible in the recovered code.

naming_conventions.name: shadow
naming_conventions.meaning: LbShadow* returned by ftLib_800872B0 for fighter shadow work

naming_conventions.name: flags and rendermode
naming_conventions.meaning: grDisplay_801C5B90 parameters replacing arg2 and arg3

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use structured recursive traversal for JObj children while preserving matrix setup and display calls.
evidence_refs: diff:grDisplay_801C5B90 recursive calls on jobj->child and jobj->next

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a goto label only for the shared display path in grDisplay_801C5DB0 where several checks converge on the same skip block.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The PR evidence shows the goto shape but does not include discussion proving it was required for matching.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retain narrow unused local padding/locals in grdisplay.c, including unused[6] in grDisplay_801C5B90 and unused fog/i locals in grDisplay_801C5DB0.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The bot report supports near-match progress, but the slice does not include objdiff details explaining which locals are required.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Switch from a local CObj view-matrix inline to HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect, aligning grdisplay.c and jobj.c on the same accessor.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 showed matched code +0.15% (+5868 bytes), matched data +0.07% (+832 bytes), grDisplay_801C5DB0 improved from 0.00% to 99.58%, grDisplay_801C5B90 improved from 99.08% to 99.85%, and grdisplay .data reached 100.00%.

notes: Diff and changed-file evidence are strong for files and code edits.
PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The automated report supports near-match/improvement claims, but no narrow objdiff, build log, or author explanation is included.

The bot report lists many grzebes matches/improvements even though the changed-file list only contains grdisplay, ground, ground.h, and jobj.c; this intake does not infer why those report entries appeared.
The title says near match, and the bot report shows grDisplay_801C5DB0 at 99.58%, so this record does not claim a full function match for grDisplay_801C5DB0.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning prototypes when a caller proves a concrete object type
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2259 changed Ground_801C1E84 from void* to HSD_GObj* in both ground.c and ground.h because grDisplay_801C5DB0 uses the returned value as an HSD_GObj, including checking foggobj->hsd_obj.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer established CObj view matrix accessors over one-off local inlines
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2259 removed a local HSD_CObjGetViewMtx inline in jobj.c and used HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect in both jobj.c and grdisplay.c for CObj view-matrix access.

source_update_candidates.title: Ground_801C1E84 returns the stage_info.x12C HSD_GObj pointer
source_update_candidates.text: In PR 2259, Ground_801C1E84 was typed as HSD_GObj* and returns stage_info.x12C; grDisplay_801C5DB0 uses the result as an HSD_GObj for fog object handling.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact for future ground/fog display work; should be verified against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Avoid creating source-local accessors when an established baselib accessor exists
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2259 removed HSD_CObjGetViewMtx, a local inline returning cobj->view_mtx, and replaced its use with HSD_CObjGetViewingMtxPtrDirect. This may be an example for the existing helper/header-inline standards rather than a new standalone rule.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate clarification only; current standards already cover preferring existing helpers and typed accessors.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the goto skip shape in grDisplay_801C5DB0 as a general tactic; the slice lacks objdiff or reviewer evidence that the goto was required.
Do not promote unused local arrays or unused fog/i locals as accepted matching style; the slice shows them but does not justify them.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or rationale; no human review comments are present.
Do not claim grDisplay_801C5DB0 fully matched; loaded evidence says near match and the bot reports 99.58%.
